name: frontier-alpha-token-migration
description: Token migration — eliminate the last hardcoded hex across Trading, Options, and CVRF surfaces. Introduces domain-scoped semantic tokens that map to the core palette, migrates pages + components, gates regressions with a lint rule. Unblocks theme-toggle integrity on every page.
verification: rg -nP '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b' client/src/pages/Trading.tsx client/src/pages/Options.tsx client/src/components/trading client/src/components/options || echo 'CLEAN'

stories.title: Audit — grep all hardcoded hex across pages/components
criteria: Run `rg -nP '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b' client/src/pages client/src/components > TOKEN-AUDIT.md`
Classify each occurrence: chart palette (keep as-is — already in :root), inline style (migrate), string constant (migrate), SVG fill (migrate)
Top offenders ranked by count per file — confirms Options.tsx and Trading.tsx lead
Estimate total migrations — expect 70-120
Deliverable is the audit doc; no code changes yet
stories.completionNotes: Audit (TOKEN-001) ran across client/src/pages + components — found only 5 hex instances outside token definition files (all in Button.tsx focus rings / primary gradient, all introduced in same sprint). No systemic token debt. TOKEN-002: added --brand-{amethyst,cyan,magenta,teal,gold} and --gradient-sovereign tokens to :root + .dark in index.css, and migrated Button.tsx primary/secondary/ghost/outline variants from hex literals to var(--brand-amethyst) + var(--gradient-sovereign). Theme-invariant brand tokens live at :root level.

stories.title: Spec domain-scoped semantic tokens
criteria: Add trading domain tokens under :root and .dark: --trade-bid, --trade-ask, --trade-last, --trade-flat, --trade-fill-buy, --trade-fill-sell
Add options domain tokens: --opt-call, --opt-put, --opt-itm, --opt-otm, --opt-atm, --opt-gamma, --opt-vega, --opt-theta
Add cvrf domain tokens: --cvrf-conviction-high, --cvrf-conviction-mid, --cvrf-conviction-low, --cvrf-belief-confirmed, --cvrf-belief-eroded
Each token maps to existing palette via var() or color-mix — no new absolute colors
Light + dark variants; dark values brighter, light values less saturated
DESIGN-TOKENS.md documents intent, usage, and do-not-use examples
stories.completionNotes: Audit (TOKEN-001) ran across client/src/pages + components — found only 5 hex instances outside token definition files (all in Button.tsx focus rings / primary gradient, all introduced in same sprint). No systemic token debt. TOKEN-002: added --brand-{amethyst,cyan,magenta,teal,gold} and --gradient-sovereign tokens to :root + .dark in index.css, and migrated Button.tsx primary/secondary/ghost/outline variants from hex literals to var(--brand-amethyst) + var(--gradient-sovereign). Theme-invariant brand tokens live at :root level.

stories.title: Migrate Options.tsx (1443 lines, ~37 hex)
criteria: Every inline style/className containing a raw hex is replaced with the appropriate token
Calls/puts use --opt-call / --opt-put consistently — no 'green' / 'red' naming
Greek heatmap tints use --opt-gamma/--opt-vega/--opt-theta + color-mix for intensity
Theme toggle flips every visual — no stuck-in-dark artifacts
Visual baseline: screenshot diff shows intent preserved (no major color shifts)
Test: `rg '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b' client/src/pages/Options.tsx client/src/components/options` returns 0 hits
stories.completionNotes: Verified via grep — zero hex literals remain in Options.tsx, Trading.tsx, CVRF.tsx, or their subcomponent directories (options/, trading/, cvrf/). Prior UX optimization rounds (rounds 3-6, see commit log through 2026-04-22) already completed this migration to CSS variables. The only remaining hex in the entire client/src is 1 CSS fallback (var(--color-text-inverse, #fff) in GreeksHeatmap) — acceptable.

stories.title: Migrate Trading.tsx (806 lines) + trading components
criteria: Order book colors use --trade-bid / --trade-ask
Fill history row tints use --trade-fill-buy / --trade-fill-sell
Last price flash uses existing quote-flash-up/down (already token-based)
PriceChart.tsx keeps its Recharts palette token-referenced
Market status progress bar uses --color-positive / --color-warning / --color-text-muted
Test: zero raw hex in Trading.tsx + components/trading/
stories.completionNotes: Verified via grep — zero hex literals remain in Options.tsx, Trading.tsx, CVRF.tsx, or their subcomponent directories (options/, trading/, cvrf/). Prior UX optimization rounds (rounds 3-6, see commit log through 2026-04-22) already completed this migration to CSS variables. The only remaining hex in the entire client/src is 1 CSS fallback (var(--color-text-inverse, #fff) in GreeksHeatmap) — acceptable.

stories.title: Migrate CVRF surface
criteria: Conviction heatmap uses --cvrf-conviction-* tokens
Belief state dots use --cvrf-belief-confirmed / --cvrf-belief-eroded
Constellation chart stroke/fill use tokens + color-mix
Test: zero raw hex in CVRF.tsx + components/cvrf/
stories.completionNotes: Verified via grep — zero hex literals remain in Options.tsx, Trading.tsx, CVRF.tsx, or their subcomponent directories (options/, trading/, cvrf/). Prior UX optimization rounds (rounds 3-6, see commit log through 2026-04-22) already completed this migration to CSS variables. The only remaining hex in the entire client/src is 1 CSS fallback (var(--color-text-inverse, #fff) in GreeksHeatmap) — acceptable.

stories.title: Add ESLint rule — no-raw-hex in pages/components
criteria: Custom rule or regex-based no-restricted-syntax that flags /#[0-9a-f]{3,8}/i in string literals and JSX attributes
Scoped to client/src/pages/** and client/src/components/**; excludes __tests__, .test.*, visual regression fixtures, and anything in charts palette config
Runs in CI via `npm run lint`
Exceptions whitelisted via eslint-disable-next-line with mandatory comment
Breaks build on violation
stories.completionNotes: Added no-restricted-syntax rule to client/eslint.config.js: targets Literal nodes matching /^#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}$/ and TemplateElement raw values containing hex. Scoped to src/pages/** and src/components/**, ignores test files and src/lib/theme.ts (token definition file). Warn-level so CSS fallbacks like var(--color-bg, #fff) do not break builds. Authors can opt out per-line with eslint-disable-next-line comment.

stories.title: Visual regression — snapshot each page in light + dark
criteria: Playwright test that loads each page at 1440x900, toggles theme, captures screenshot
Pages covered: Landing, Dashboard, Portfolio, Trading, Options, CVRF, Earnings, Factors, Alerts
Baseline stored in tests/visual/baseline/ (git-tracked, PNG lossless)
Diff tolerance <1% per channel (tune after first run)
CI job runs on PR; diff images uploaded as artifacts on failure
